title: Vogel's TV wall mount, Black, 26 - 55", 180°
features: UltraThin: the flattest moveable TV mount available. Mount your TV as flat against the wall as possible, only 1.4 inches from the wall
Smoothly turn your TV up to 180 degrees with only one finger. It provides safe and secure mounting for TVs ranging from 40" to 65 " up to 55 lbs. Max VESA 600x400
Hide all unsightly cables and adjust the levelling for a perfect viewing position even after installation
All the required screws are included with the pre-assembled wall mount, as well as a drilling template, for super easy installation.
Compatible with all flat screen TV brands such as Samsung, LG, Panasonic, SONY, Sharp, Vizio and Funai. Made with high quality aluminium and backed by Vogel's lifetime guarantee
description: Product Description Impress your friends and neighbors by mounting your flat screen TV on the THIN 445 ExtraThin swivel TV wall mount, the flattest moveable TV mount available. These swivel TV wall brackets give you the ultimate viewing flexibility for your bedroom, living room, children’s room and kitchen while allowing you to mount your TV as flat against the wall as possible. With up to 180 degrees (90 degrees left and 90 degrees right) horizontal rotation, and up to 20 degrees tilt, these flat screen wall brackets enhance your guests’ TV viewing pleasure. Don’t miss a single instruction when watching your cooking show by turning your flat screen TV as needed. You can turn it to face the oven while you cook, or the worktop as you roll out your pastry. Or, mount your LED/LCD/Plasma TV next to your bed and watch a late night show in comfort. These swivel TV wall brackets are basically invisible, with just 1.4 inches of space between the TV and the wall. Not only this, but a cable inlay system keeps unsightly power leads hidden from view and it only takes a moment to install the LED/LCD/Plasma TV wall mount with the easy level adjustment and drilling template. The THIN 445 is suitable for 26 to 55 inch screens with a maximum screen thickness of 2 inches. It gives you the ability to extend your TV up to 20 inches from the wall. Fits all 26", 27", 28", 29", 30", 32", 34", 39", 40", 42", 46", 48", 50" and 55" TVs with VESA mounting holes 100x100, 100x200, 200x100, 200x200, 200x300, 300x200, 300x300, 300x400, 400x300, 40x,400. Fits all TVs from Samsung, LG, SONY, Panasonic, Sharp and more. Your TV should not exceed the max weight of the TV wall mount. Vogel’s Wall Mounts use ball bearing technology for a super smooth and stable movement, designed and tested for regular and long term use. With over 40 years of Dutch design experience and manufacturing, supported by thorough weight testing up to 3 times the advertised weight, you can count on Vogel's to give you lifelong consistent performance day in, day out. Box Contains Pre assembled TV Wall Mount Wall Mounting screws and plugs TV screen mounting screws, washer and nuts Installation manual Drilling Template
